structures.name: Skin
structures.blurb: The body's largest organ; barrier, thermoregulation and sensation.

structures.name: Musculature
structures.blurb: Skeletal muscles that produce movement and posture.

structures.name: Skull
structures.blurb: Encloses and protects the brain; houses the special sense organs.

structures.name: Spine (vertebral column)
structures.blurb: 33 vertebrae protecting the spinal cord; axial support.

structures.name: Rib cage
structures.blurb: Protects the heart and lungs; assists ventilation.

structures.name: Pelvis
structures.blurb: Supports the trunk and protects pelvic organs.

structures.name: Arm bones
structures.blurb: Humerus, radius and ulna of the upper limbs.

structures.name: Leg bones
structures.blurb: Femur, tibia and fibula of the lower limbs; femur is the longest bone.

structures.name: Brain
structures.blurb: Central nervous system control; cognition, movement, autonomic regulation.

structures.name: Heart
structures.blurb: Four-chambered muscular pump driving systemic and pulmonary circulation.

structures.name: Lungs
structures.blurb: Gas exchange; oxygen uptake and carbon-dioxide clearance.

structures.name: Liver
structures.blurb: Metabolism, detoxification, bile production and clotting-factor synthesis.

structures.name: Stomach
structures.blurb: Acidic digestion and reservoir for ingested food.

structures.name: Intestines
structures.blurb: Small and large bowel; nutrient absorption and stool formation.

structures.name: Kidneys
structures.blurb: Filter blood, regulate fluid/electrolytes and blood pressure.

structures.name: Urinary bladder
structures.blurb: Stores urine before voiding.

structures.name: Spleen
structures.blurb: Filters blood and supports immune function.

structures.name: Pancreas
structures.blurb: Endocrine (insulin/glucagon) and exocrine (digestive enzymes) organ.

structures.name: Trachea
structures.blurb: The windpipe; conducts air between the larynx and the bronchi.

structures.name: Thyroid gland
structures.blurb: Neck endocrine gland regulating metabolism via thyroid hormones.

structures.name: Gallbladder
structures.blurb: Stores and concentrates bile released with fatty meals.

structures.name: Diaphragm
structures.blurb: The primary muscle of respiration, separating thorax and abdomen.
